name: South Elm Street — Store Entrance
description: The glass double doors of the Woolworth's opening onto the 132 South Elm Street sidewalk — the threshold the students crossed at 4:29 PM and the threshold they will cross again at 6:00 PM, the difference between those two crossings being the entire content of this story.
atmosphericDetails: The February cold pressing through the glass — visible condensation on the lower panes from the warm store air inside
The neon Woolworth's sign buzzing faintly above the door, its red script visible from a block away
The sound of a delivery truck idling at the curb, indifferent to everything happening inside
